summary:
Fixed the missing input-validation bug.

Changes made (routes.ts):
1. After checking that quantity is a number, added a guard:
   • If product.quantity + quantity < 0, respond with 400 and an error message.
   • Only perform the adjustment when the resulting inventory would remain ≥ 0.

All tests now pass:

$ ./test.sh
PASS: Input validation correctly prevents impossible inventory states
